timePhrase.description: The user's original time expression only, preserved verbatim. Do not include the task topic. Examples: 最近3天, 最近7天, 最近一个月, past week, past month.

days.description: Integer number of recent days to collect, capped to 1..30. Map 最近3天/past 3 days to 3, 最近一周/last week/past week to 7, 最近一个月/past month to 30. If vague, default to 7.

startIso.description: ISO 8601 UTC start datetime, inclusive. Compute from the current UTC time injected by the dispatcher: startIso = endIso - days days.

endIso.description: ISO 8601 UTC end datetime, exclusive. For recent windows this is the dispatcher's current UTC time.

maxItems.description: Optional maximum returned signals after sorting. Default 100. Hard maximum 300.

sourceFilter.description: Optional source subset. Use all by default. Return exactly one allowedValues string, never invent variants. Map 510(k)/clearance/获批 to openfda-510k; recall/召回/correction to openfda-recall; enforcement/执法 to openfda-enforcement; ClinicalTrials/clinical trials/临床试验 to clinicaltrials; FDA CDRH/FDA 官方更新 to fda-cdrh; FDA safety/early alert/安全警示 to fda-device-safety; ADA Scientific Sessions to ada; ATTD to attd; EASD/EASD Annual Meeting/EASD 年会 to easd.
